title: nidorella foliosa
intro: Nidorella foliosa, also known as the leafy nidorella or yellow daisy bush, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in South African medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, and is also used to treat digestive problems and skin conditions. Nidorella foliosa can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which are often used in traditional African medicine.
